Video.summary: Lifeguards try to resuscitate a lifeless man found face down in the surf. And Reidy's back.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 01

Video.summary: A lifeless swimmer is dragged from the water. Lifeguards compete in a fancy dress surfing competition.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 10

Video.summary: After a drunk reveller falls 20 metres off a cliff, lifeguards can’t believe the state he’s in.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 09

Video.summary: Harrison's life is in danger when a double rescue goes horribly wrong.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 10

Video.summary: Lifeguards respond to a suspected heart attack. Two green whistles are used for a dislocated shoulder.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 03

Video.summary: Lifeguards conduct an experiment, attempting to combat the lack of beachgoers reading dangerous current signs.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 09

Video.summary: Tommy rescues intoxicated tourists. Reidy pursues creeps on the beach. A Danish backpacker bares all on Bondi.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 10

Video.summary: When surfer Damo is treated for a spinal injury, lifeguards fear the worst.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 07

Video.summary: The lifeguards put their lives on the line in the annual lifeguard challenge.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 07

Video.summary: A Japanese tourist drowns just metres from lifeguards trying to save him. Beardy races to 2 Nepalese men.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 01

Video.summary: Jesse fractures his spine and Jake rescues a beginner surfer being smashed against cliffs.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 13

Video.summary: A miscommunication between lifeguards on the radio could cause serious problems in the water.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 09

Video.summary: Lifeguards sound the shark alarm. Young lifeguard Jake must retrieve a dead body
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 10

Video.summary: Lifeguards attend a deep water spinal rescue, and try catch a rat that’s been eating cables in their buggies.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 11

Video.summary: A surfer suffers a serious fin chop and Will attempts to run for 48 hours with no sleep.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 03

Video.summary: A man falls off the jetski rescue mat. Crowds swell to 40,010 so Hoppo must decide whether to clear the water.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 01

Video.summary: Bondi faces a bluebottle invasion. Singlets attends his own son's spinal injury. Clint rescues a drowning man.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 05

Video.summary: Bluebottles swarm at Bondi, so Harries devises a magical treatment for the stings.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 08

Video.summary: Trainee Lachie completes his first big solo rescue. The team farewell one of their most dedicated lifeguards.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 08

Video.summary: Jack’s rescuing a boy in big swell and makes a bold call when they’re almost smashed onto rocks.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 10

Video.summary: New trainee Tommy volunteers to catch a sea snake. Jesse clears the water to save an unresponsive man.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 02

Video.summary: Big waves come to Bondi and Maxi hits trouble during a daring jetski rescue.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 06

Video.summary: The surf club rescue boat collides with a reef. A boy howls in pain, suffering a mystery stomach illness.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 03

Video.summary: Lifeguards assist a concussed boy who suffered a seizure, and a woman hit by a car. Karlie Kloss visits Bondi.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 05

Video.summary: Family members watch as lifeguards attempt to resuscitate two people from the same family.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 12

Video.summary: Jackson administers the EpiPen for anaphylactic shock and Chase and Max go fishing on jetskis.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 07

Video.summary: Tommy faces seaweed perils on the jetski. Chase and Will rush north on the jetski for a cliff fall.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 05

Video.summary: A drunk woman goes missing. The most critical rescue of the season stirs up emotional memories for Terry.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 06

Video.summary: Borders open, tourists flood Bondi. Chase explores a shark colony with a local diver.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 06

Video.summary: Spotlights illuminate World Pride Beach Party with 15,010 revelers. Hoppo marks 30 years on the beach.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 11

Video.summary: Jack and Azza aid a perplexing surfer. Maxi enforces rules in rescues, facing unprecedented challenges later.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 02

Video.summary: Concerns rise over a missing man and the Annual race sparks controversy as a lifeguard organizes some "help".
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 08

Video.summary: Kite surfers visit a stormy Bondi. Chappo and Jack aid victim of chest pain, Harries confronts a body surfer.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 10

Video.summary: After a mass rescue, lifeguards search for a student who didn't make it back to the beach.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 09

Video.summary: Chappo makes a sprint to rescue a swimmer and Bagus keeps a nude photo shoot secret from the lifeguards.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 03

Video.summary: After 2 years Bondi has reopened and the lifeguards manage 30,010 beachgoers.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 01

Video.summary: An elderly lady suffers a seizure. A bizarre injury occurs involving a dog and a man's wounded manhood.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 09

Video.summary: Chappo rushes in for a life and death rescue in the monster swells, but things don’t go as planned.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 04

Video.summary: Lifeguards deal with a missing boy and two friends - one dislocates his hip, the other has a seizure.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 07

Video.summary: Julie learns the ropes on Bondi. A man confronts a photographer taking pictures of his topless girlfriend.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 08

Video.summary: Yatesy attempts to rescue an inexperienced surfer. After shark sightings, the lifeguards test new technology.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 11

Video.summary: As lifeguards try bring back a woman found lifeless between the flags, her mentally impaired son arrives.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 02

Video.summary: Jethro rescues a man more than double his size, then accidentally locks himself in the lifeguard tower.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 03

Video.summary: Hoppo and Evo face rescues on summer's hottest day. Newbies Matt and Noah are tested as their radio dies.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 05

Video.summary: A body is reported to lifeguards. Stormy weather brings a missing kayaker. Max McGuigan's first rescue.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 02

Video.summary: Rookie Max wows with a rescue. A Korean student's surfing trip turns painful. Stolen car keys are reported.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 09

Video.summary: Surfer seeks refuge from angry beachgoer. Spiderman visits the beach. Lifeguard teams compete in a race.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 07
